```{r}
#| label: part-grants-list
#| results: asis

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

format_grant_source <- function(source) {
  source %>%
    str_replace_all(fixed("(Department of the Economy NI)"), "DfE NI") %>%
    str_replace_all(fixed("(UKFin+/EPSRC)"), "UKFin+")
}

format_grant_period <- function(start, end) {
  if (is.na(end) || end == "") {
    as.character(start)
  } else {
    paste0(start, "–", end)
  }
}

grants_list <- read.csv("../data/Grant_income.csv", check.names = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    Source = format_grant_source(Source),
    Period = mapply(format_grant_period, Start, End),
    Amount = scales::comma(Amount, prefix = "£"),
    Title = str_replace_all(Title, "–", "-")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Start), desc(Amount))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(grants_list))) {
  cat(sprintf(
    "- **%s** (%s, %s) — %s — **%s** *(%s)*\n",
    grants_list$Source[i],
    grants_list$`My Role`[i],
    grants_list$Period[i],
    grants_list$Title[i],
    grants_list$Amount[i],
    grants_list$Type[i]
  ))
}
```
